'''Falken's Lab''' was a research laboratory located in an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] orbiting the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Mrlsst/Legends|Mrlsst]] in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. It was operated by the physicist and composer [[Rorax Falken]].

==Appearances==
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 7|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 7]] {{1st}}
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 8|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 8]]
